segments.title: Select-Service
segments.description: Efficient properties with targeted amenities for business and leisure travelers seeking consistent quality.

segments.title: Extended-Stay
segments.description: Suite-style properties designed for longer-term guests, requiring specialized FF&E including kitchen and living areas.

segments.title: Full-Service
segments.description: Premium properties offering comprehensive amenities, demanding the highest level of FF&E specification and execution.

brands.name: Courtyard by Marriott
brands.description: A leading select-service brand offering smart, stylish spaces designed for the modern traveler. Pinnacle South has supported multiple Courtyard properties across the Southeast.

brands.name: Marriott
brands.description: The flagship Marriott brand represents full-service excellence. Pinnacle South's experience with Marriott properties demonstrates our capability in premium hospitality FF&E.

brands.name: Homewood Suites
brands.description: An upscale extended-stay brand offering spacious suite-style accommodations. Our team specializes in the unique FF&E requirements of extended-stay properties.

brands.name: Hampton Inn & Suites
brands.description: One of the most recognized brands in the select-service segment, known for consistent quality and value. We've delivered FF&E for both new-build and renovation Hampton projects.

brands.name: Hilton
brands.description: A globally recognized name in hospitality, Hilton hotels demand the highest standards in furnishings and fixtures. Our team delivers with precision and reliability.
